title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: The key to the Earth raid is a weapon called the Kero Ball, but when it malfunctions, the squad ends up with more sergeants than it can manage.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: When a space detective chases Keroro and his squad into an alternate dimension, he gets to see what a frog can do in maximum humidity.

title: Robotan
desc: Robotan, a robot from outer space, visits Earth and makes friends with a young boy. Whenever his new friend gets in trouble or goes on an adventure, Robotan is on hand to help.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Denshichi and Sakichi are met by bandits whilst trying to cross the bridge. Afterwards, they are robbed of their belongings.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Doi sensei abruptly announces a mathematical examination which leaves the classroom ambience chaotic. Meanwhile, Kirimaru is confident of his success.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Suzugouya Yoshirou visits Yamada sensei from the Fuuma Ninjutsu Academy. However, upon meeting, he regards Yamada sensei as his father.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Hama Shuichirou from Hodo Hodo Castle is met again by Rantarou and the others. Afterwards, they discuss a curious fact about the castle.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Shouzaemon, who calmly likes to analyse everything, asks the boisterous Nanamatsu senpai to understand his own feelings by observing the former.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Rantarou, a young boy who wants to be a ninja, goes to a special school, where he makes friends and engages in a number of misadventures.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Ninjutsu Academy is visited by Onitake's Nishinagasuhondoori Kyuuchoume in order to get recommendations for selecting a student.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Kukuchi senpai's love for tofu leads him to make an excess amount of it. Afterwards, Takeya senpai suggests serving the leftovers to the Biology Committee's pets.

title: Naruto: Shippuden
desc: Breaking the Five-Seal Barrier traps Team Guy in a fight against perfect copies of themselves, whilst Naruto chases Deidara and Sakura faces Sasori alongside Chiyo.

title: Naruto: Shippuden
desc: Sakura is baffled by Sasori's bizarre physical form until Granny Chiyo reveals the truth about his puppet shell, Hiruko.

title: Naruto: Shippuden
desc: Sakura and Chiyo unmask Sasori to find he has not aged in twenty years, but Chiyo is truly horrified by his next puppet.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: A small frog becomes too proud of himself when Tamama suddenly replaces Keroro as the courageous leader of the amphibious invasion.

title: Naruto: Shippuden
desc: Trapped within a lethal cloud of poison, Sakura resorts to a risky gamble by using a Paper Bomb to blast her way to safety.

title: Naruto: Shippuden
desc: Sasori reveals the Third Kazekage's lethal magnetic powers, forcing Sakura and Chiyo into a desperate defense as a ruthless assault begins.

title: Naruto: Shippuden
desc: As battles rage on multiple fronts, Sakura relies on Lady Tsunade's training to read Sasori's movements and survive his lethal strikes.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: A gang of frightening killers are trying to kidnap Momoka. So, Sergeant Frog's platoon are the only brave soldiers who can protect her.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: Keroro's squad tries its best to disrupt the sports day so that Natsumi's mom can reach in time for the three-legged race.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: After Shinbei recommends an udon shop, Yuki, Tomomi and Oshige decide to pay it a visit. However, on arriving they find the shop owner and Makinosuke arguing.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Kingo, who has been learning under the tutelage of Tobe sensei, enters the infirmary where Rantarou and the others are present.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Rantarou, a young boy who wants to be a ninja, goes to a special school, where he makes friends and engages in a number of misadventures.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: When a group race competition is organised, Rantarou, Kirimaru and Shinbei participate in it but plan to use a shortcut.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Rantarou, Kirimaru and Shinbei eat dango and observe Andou sensei returning to Ninjutsu Academy whilst practising his puns.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Shousei arrives to teach the application of firearms at the Ninjutsu Academy. There, he receives the utmost respect from Torawaka.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: The Dining Hall Lady's lunch draws in Kitaishi Teruyo, who is later treated to Ooki Masanosuke's pickled chinese onions.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Whilst Nannosono Koreshiki is fishing along the bank of a river, Rantarou and Sanjirou are passing by and notice that he does not know how to fish.

title: Naruto: Shippuden
desc: Naruto Uzumaki, a headstrong adolescent who seeks approval and acceptance, trains to overcome various challenges and become the village Hokage.

title: Naruto: Shippuden
desc: Naruto Uzumaki, a headstrong adolescent who seeks approval and acceptance, trains to overcome various challenges and become the village Hokage.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: The invasion plan takes a chilly turn when the Sergeant and his troops blanket Tokyo with snow. But, once the sun comes out, mysterious traps start troubling the platoon.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: Natsumi is brilliant at almost every subject, except Drama. So, Sergeant Frog tries to give her a quick coaching in acting, but he himself ends up on stage.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: Tamama's lies land him in hot water when an overly talkative friend pays a visit to Earth.

title: Robotan
desc: Robotan, a robot from outer space, visits Earth and makes friends with a young boy. Whenever his new friend gets in trouble or goes on an adventure, Robotan is on hand to help.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: The Dokutamas ride fake horses to arrive at Ninjutsu Academy to meet the horse specialist Danzou for a great horse race held by Dokutake Castle.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Excessive waste of budget in Ninjutsu Academy leads to the headmaster ordering the Budget Committee President Shioe to find a solution.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Whilst on infirmary duty, Rantarou is ordered to take a letter to Kinraku Temple by the Headmaster. However, on the way, Rantarou starts thinking that he is the fastest runner.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: To train in genjutsu, Satoimo Gyouja and Jinenjo Koji journey to the mountain. Meanwhile, Satoimo's wife Miss Maitake arrives.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: When Komatsuda has to help out at his family's store, he requests Rantarou and the others to ask Demo Shikanosuke to replace him.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Kirimaru focuses on his part-time job and forgets to do his homework. As a result, Doi sensei tries to help him finish his homework on time.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: When Fuwa senpai's appearance leaves much to be desired, Rantarou and the others become curious and learn that Kinoshita sensei has deprived them of sleep.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: A marathon is held during the mountain pass class. However, Shinbei is unable to keep up with the rest of the class and loses sight of them.

desc: Naruto Uzumaki, a headstrong adolescent who seeks approval and acceptance, trains to overcome various challenges and become the village Hokage.
